channel.title: Morning Tax
channel.description: Delivered every Monday by 10 a.m., Weekly Tax examines the latest news in tax politics and policy.

item.title: What does ‘free’ mean, exactly?
item.description: A federal appeals court has tossed aside a Federal Trade Commission order that banned TurboTax from calling some of its products free.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: Could there be a further refund bump?
item.description: Stop us if you’ve heard this before, but the average tax refund that the IRS is paying out is slowly declining — even as they remain ahead of last year’s pace.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: The indexing push continues
item.description: Republicans certainly aren’t backing off their effort to get the Trump administration to unilaterally cut taxes on capital gains.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: Conservatives build their case on housing tax cut
item.description: A high-profile group of low-tax advocates is pushing a proposal that would slash the number of people who would owe capital gains taxes after selling a home.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: Cluttering up the code
item.description: Republicans have argued that last year’s tax cuts will boost incomes and help families as they seek to gin up support ahead of this year’s midterms. But here’s something they can’t really say — that the One Big Beautiful Bill Act simplified the tax system.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: More digging on IRS and ICE
item.description: The questions about the IRS’s improper disclosure of confidential taxpayer data to immigration authorities aren’t going anywhere.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: Getting on the schedule
item.description: Will the Senate have the space to effectively repeal Washington, D.C.’s decision not to adopt certain provisions from last year’s GOP tax law at the local level?
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker

item.title: IRS to remain open...at least for the time being
item.description: The IRS will keep everyone on the job at least through this coming Saturday, even with the government currently shuttered.
item.dc:creator: By Bernie Becker
